Initial draft of utility functions to aid in the handling of seatrack
data.

Installation:

    devtools::install_github("NINAnor/seatrackRtools")

Documentation can be found
[here](https://NINAnor.github.io/seatrackRtools/)

An example of using the functions can be found
[here](https://NINAnor.github.io/seatrackRtools/articles/introduction.html)

# Package index

## Start interface

Run a shiny app to perform (some) of the functions below

- [`run_app()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/run_app.md)
  : Run the Shiny App

## Setup functions

Functions to set up the sea track folder and paths.

- [`get_all_locations()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_all_locations.md)
  : Get All Locations
- [`set_sea_track_folder()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/set_sea_track_folder.md)
  : Set the base directory for the sea track folder
- [`start_logging()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/start_logging.md)
  : Start logging to a file

## GLS functions

Functions to assist in running the within-seatrack GLS pipeline

- [`export_check_calibration()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/export_check_calibration.md)
  : Export calibration check results to Excel

- [`gls_calibrate_all()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_calibrate_all.md)
  : Calibrate all species/colony combinations found in seatrack logger
  data import folder

- [`gls_calibrate_file()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_calibrate_file.md)
  : Prepare GLS files for calibration

- [`gls_calibrate_species_colony()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_calibrate_species_colony.md)
  : Prepare a seatrack species/colony combination for calibration

- [`gls_check_calibration()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_check_calibration.md)
  : Check calibration status for all species/colony combinations

- [`gls_import()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_import.md)
  : Import GLS position data to the SEATRACK database

- [`gls_metadata()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_metadata.md)
  : Get metadata from database based on GLS files in import directory

- [`gls_prepare_calibration()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_prepare_calibration.md)
  : Prepare GLS calibration data using seatrack database

- [`gls_prepare_file_upload()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_prepare_file_upload.md)
  : Prepare a single GLS position data file for database upload

- [`gls_prepare_folder_upload()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_prepare_folder_upload.md)
  : Prepare GLS position data for database upload

- [`gls_process_positions()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_process_positions.md)
  : Process GLS position data using seatrackRgls

- [`gls_process_species_colony()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_process_species_colony.md)
  : Process GLS position data for a specific species/colony combination

- [`gls_seatrack_calibration()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_seatrack_calibration.md)
  : Handle existing GLS calibration data

- [`gls_seatrack_colony_info()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_seatrack_colony_info.md)
  :

  Get `all_colony_info` for GLS processing

- [`gls_upload_pos_data()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/gls_upload_pos_data.md)
  : Upload GLS position data to the SEATRACK database

## Metdata functions

Functions to handle and process metadata sheets.

### General metadata functions

- [`correct_models()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/correct_models.md)
  : Correct logger models in metadata based on database values
- [`get_location_unprocessed()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_location_unprocessed.md)
  : Get unimported metadata
- [`get_master_import_path()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_master_import_path.md)
  : Get the path of the master import file
- [`get_master_import_paths()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_master_import_paths.md)
  : Get master import paths
- [`handle_partner_metadata()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_partner_metadata.md)
  : Add partner provided metadata to the master import file
- [`load_all_master_import()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_all_master_import.md)
  : Load master import file for all colonies
- [`load_master_import()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_master_import.md)
  : Load master import file for a given colony
- [`load_partner_metadata()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_partner_metadata.md)
  : Load partner provided metadata from an Excel file
- [`modify_master_import_in_list()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/modify_master_import_in_list.md)
  : Given a new master import, modify all master imports in a list
  sharing the same path
- [`save_all_modified()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/save_all_modified.md)
  : Save all modified master sheets
- [`save_master_sheet()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/save_master_sheet.md)
  : Save a master sheet to an Excel file.
- [`set_master_import_paths()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/set_master_import_paths.md)
  : Set master import paths

### Logger metadata functions

Functions to load logger data

- [`end_logger_session()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/end_logger_session.md)
  : Modify logger status to end a session
- [`get_logger_from_metadata()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_logger_from_metadata.md)
  : Find logger instances in files
- [`get_unfinished_session()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_unfinished_session.md)
  : Find a logger's unfinished session in the master startup data frame
- [`handle_returned_loggers()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_returned_loggers.md)
  : Handle restarted loggers
- [`modify_logger_status()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/modify_logger_status.md)
  : Modify logger status

### Nonresponsive logger metadata functions

Functions to load and update non-responsive sheets

- [`append_to_nonresponsive()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/append_to_nonresponsive.md)
  : Append to nonresponsive list
- [`get_raw_data_prev_session()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_raw_data_prev_session.md)
  : Get raw data from previous sessions
- [`get_raw_data_prev_session_excel()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_raw_data_prev_session_excel.md)
  : Get raw data from previous sessions from an excel sheet
- [`load_nonresponsive()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_nonresponsive.md)
  : Load multiple nonresponsive logger sheets
- [`load_nonresponsive_sheet()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_nonresponsive_sheet.md)
  : Load nonresponsive logger sheet for current year
- [`nonresponsive_from_master()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/nonresponsive_from_master.md)
  : Get all nonresponsive loggers and export
- [`save_nonresponsive()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/save_nonresponsive.md)
  : Save multiple nonresponsive logger sheets to Excel files

### Startup metadata functions

Functions to load and update startup sheets

- [`add_loggers_from_startup()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/add_loggers_from_startup.md)
  : Attempt to add logger from startup sheets
- [`get_startup_paths()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_startup_paths.md)
  : Get paths to all startup Excel files
- [`set_comments()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/set_comments.md)
  : Set or append comments in the master_startup data frame
- [`set_master_startup_value()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/set_master_startup_value.md)
  : Set a value in a specific cell of master startup

### Encounter metadata functions

Functions to load and update encounter data

- [`append_encounter_data()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/append_encounter_data.md)
  : Append encounter data to the master import metadata

## Database import

Functions to import data into the Database

### Metadata preperation functions

- [`prepare_master_sheet_for_db()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/prepare_master_sheet_for_db.md)
  : Prepare master sheet for database import
- [`prepare_session_batch()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/prepare_session_batch.md)
  : Prepare session batch for database import
- [`prepare_session_batches()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/prepare_session_batches.md)
  : Prepare session batches for database import
- [`prepare_session_deployments()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/prepare_session_deployments.md)
  : Get session deployments
- [`prepare_session_retrievals()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/prepare_session_retrievals.md)
  : Get session retrievals

### Metadata upload functions

- [`push_db_import_collection()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/push_db_import_collection.md)
  : Push database import collection to database
- [`push_db_import_collections()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/push_db_import_collections.md)
  : Push multiple database import collections to database
- [`push_deployments()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/push_deployments.md)
  : Push deployments to database
- [`push_master_import_file_to_db()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/push_master_import_file_to_db.md)
  : Push master import file to database
- [`push_retrievals()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/push_retrievals.md)
  : Push retrievals to database
- [`push_shutdowns()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/push_shutdowns.md)
  : Push shutdowns to database
- [`push_startup()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/push_startup.md)
  : Push startups to database

### Activity data preperation functions

- [`handle_immersion_lotek()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_immersion_lotek.md)
  : Handle immersion data from Lotek logger
- [`handle_immersion_migrate()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_immersion_migrate.md)
  : Handle immersion data from Migrate logger
- [`handle_light_lotek()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_light_lotek.md)
  : Handle light data from Lotek logger
- [`handle_light_migrate()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_light_migrate.md)
  : Handle light data from Migrate logger
- [`handle_temperature_lotek()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_temperature_lotek.md)
  : Handle temperature data from Lotek logger
- [`handle_temperature_migrate()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_temperature_migrate.md)
  : Handle temperature data from Migrate logger
- [`load_immersion_data()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_immersion_data.md)
  : Load immersion data from file
- [`load_light_data()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_light_data.md)
  : Load light data from file
- [`load_temperature_data()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_temperature_data.md)
  : Load temperature data from file

### Activity data upload functions

- [`get_activity_db_sessions()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_activity_db_sessions.md)
  : Get activity database sessions
- [`handle_activity()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/handle_activity.md)
  : Handle activity data file
- [`load_activity()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_activity.md)
  : Load activity data from file
- [`push_db_activity()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/push_db_activity.md)
  : Push activity data to database

## Field planning sheet functions

Functions to load and handle data from the field planning sheet

- [`field_plan_check_locations()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/field_plan_check_locations.md)
  : Check and update locations in the field plan sheet
- [`field_plan_combine_locations()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/field_plan_combine_locations.md)
  : Combine duplicate locations/species in the field plan sheet
- [`get_clean_field_plan()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_clean_field_plan.md)
  : Read and clean the field plan data
- [`get_field_plan()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_field_plan.md)
  : Read and process the field plan Excel sheet

## Annual report

### Appendix table createion

Functions to create and export annual report appendix tables

- [`create_appendix_table_ft()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/create_appendix_table_ft.md)
  : Create a formatted flextable for the appendix table
- [`export_appendix_table_excel()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/export_appendix_table_excel.md)
  : Export the flextable to an Excel file with formatting
- [`export_event_table()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/export_event_table.md)
  : Annual report event tables This function exports an excel file of an
  annual report event table. The table is generated using the
  get_event_table_ft function, which creates a flextable object based on
  the field plan and database. The export_event_table function then
  formats the table and saves it as an excel file in the specified
  directory.
- [`get_event_table_ft()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_event_table_ft.md)
  : Get event table as flextable This function generates a flextable
  object for an event table based on the field plan and database. It
  retrieves the relevant data for the specified event type, logger type,
  target age, and target species, and formats it into a flextable with
  appropriate styling and formatting for use in the annual report.
- [`make_annual_report_tables()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/make_annual_report_tables.md)
  : Export all tables for annual report

## General utility functions

- [`get_open_session_dates()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_open_session_dates.md)
  : Get open session dates Convenience function to get the open date for
  a set of logger sessions. If the shutdown date is available, use that.
  If not, use the download date. If both exist, use the earlier date. If
  there is another session from the same logger, use the start of that.
  If neither are available, use a date far in the future to indicate the
  session is still open.
- [`load_sheets_as_list()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/load_sheets_as_list.md)
  : Load specified sheets from an Excel file into a list of data frames

## Database utility functions

- [`check_db_metadata_import()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/check_db_metadata_import.md)
  : Check existing rows in database given certain columns from a
  metadata dataframe
- [`check_deployment_db()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/check_deployment_db.md)
  : Check existing deployments in database
- [`check_retrieval_db()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/check_retrieval_db.md)
  : Check existing retrievals in database
- [`check_shutdown_db()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/check_shutdown_db.md)
  : Check existing shutdowns in database
- [`check_startups_active_db()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/check_startups_active_db.md)
  : Check existing active sessions in database
- [`check_startups_db()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/check_startups_db.md)
  : Check existing startups in database

## Classes

- [`LoadedWB`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/LoadedWB.md)
  : LoadedMetadata Class
- [`LoadedWBCollection`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/LoadedWBCollection.md)
  : LoadedWBCollection Class
- [`SessionBatch`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/SessionBatch.md)
  : SessionBatch Class
- [`DBImportCollection`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/DBImportCollection.md)
  : DBImportCollection Class

## ColonyRepr prep

Functions to assist in working with the ColonyRepr-package

- [`prep_SEATRACK_ColonyRepr()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/prep_SEATRACK_ColonyRepr.md)
  : Extracts data from the SEATRACK DB and prepares it for the
  ColonyRepr functions
- [`run_ColonyRepr()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/run_ColonyRepr.md)
  : Function to extract desired data from the SEATRACK database and
  fully run the colony representativeness analysis

## Data request handling

Functions for managing data requests in the database.

- [`create_readme()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/create_readme.md)
  : Create SEATRACK documentation README
- [`data_request()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/data_request.md)
  : Get SEATRACK data request
- [`export_data_package()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/export_data_package.md)
  : Export a data request package
- [`find_raw_data()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/find_raw_data.md)
  : Find raw data files for a given session ID and data type
- [`get_irma_from_onedrive()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/get_irma_from_onedrive.md)
  : Get IRMA data from OneDrive
- [`parse_data_request_folder()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/parse_data_request_folder.md)
  : Parse data request PDFs and compile into a summary CSV This function
  reads all PDF files in a specified folder, extracts relevant
  information from each PDF, and compiles it into a summary. The summary
  can then be exported as a CSV file.
- [`parse_data_request_pdf()`](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/reference/parse_data_request_pdf.md)
  : Parse a single PDF data request file and extract relevant
  information This function reads a PDF file, extracts specific
  information such as the applicant's name, project title, study area,
  species involved, and other details, and compiles this information
  into a structured format.

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Appendix
  table](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/articles/appendix_table.md):
- [Handling
  loggers](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/articles/handling_loggers.md):

  script](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/articles/introduction.md):
- [Nonresponsive
  loggers](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/articles/nonresponsive_loggers.md):
- [GLS
  workflow](https://ninanor.github.io/seatrackRtools/articles/seatrack_gls.md):
